navy.usage: Primary brand color. Hero headline emphasis, topic badges, nav CTA button (background), card accents, outline buttons (border + text), program stage tags

bronze.usage: Accent color. Primary CTA buttons (background), section labels (eyebrow text), decorative lines, hero eyebrow, featured card type badges, hover accents

charcoal.usage: Primary text color. Headings, body text, card titles

slate.usage: Secondary text color. Descriptions, nav links, card body copy, hero subhead

stone.usage: Page background. Light, warm neutral base

offwhite.usage: Alternating section backgrounds, card icon areas, subtle contrast layers

white.usage: Card surfaces, elevated content areas, button text on dark backgrounds

dark.usage: Footer background, dark section backgrounds, deep navy for contrast areas

display_font.usage: All headings (h1–h3), section titles, program names, testimonial quotes

body_font.usage: Body copy, nav links, buttons, labels, section eyebrows, card descriptions, footer text

patterns.header: Fixed frosted-glass header (backdrop-filter: blur(16px), semi-transparent stone background)
patterns.scroll_animations: Fade-up on scroll via IntersectionObserver (opacity 0→1, translateY 24px→0, 0.7s ease-out)
patterns.noise_texture: SVG fractalNoise overlay at 0.018 opacity (body) / 0.03 opacity (sections)
patterns.shadows: Layered, low-opacity: cards use 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.04) base + 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06) elevated
